subject: [PATCH v4 12/14] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_SET_MODE for runtime sync/async toggle

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a new ioctl, UFFDIO_SET_MODE, which allows a VMM to toggle between sync and async RWP modes at runtime without re-registering the userfaultfd. The ioctl takes an enable/disable bitmask of UFFD_FEATURE_* flags, with only UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC being toggleable today. When switching to async mode, pending sync waiters are woken so they retry and auto-resolve under the new mode. This feature is useful for scenarios where a VMM needs to switch between sync and async modes on-the-fly, such as during working set scanning or page eviction.
